signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February but below market forecasts of 2.4%; this is the latest reported figure from Statistics Korea, updated in early April 2026[1].  
Bank of Korea held its policy rate at 2.5% last week (around April 10, 2026) for a sixth

signals.headline: Israel Agrees to 10-Day Ceasefire in Lebanon; Iran Declares Strait of Hormuz Open for Commercial Shipping** | **YES** |

Israel Agrees to 10-Day Ceasefire in Lebanon; Iran Declares Strait of Hormuz Open for Commercial Shipping** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence
